extraction.one_line_summary: MCNULTY Brandon won from a three-man break after Healy attacked solo with 35km to go but was reeled back on the descent.
tactical_patterns: Healy repeated his stage-winning pattern (attacking 50km out) but teams adapted; McNulty bridged methodically on descent.
GC teams let 20-rider break with Rubio 11min down go; risk tolerance shows tactical shift accepting large breakaway time gaps.
Frigo sprinted from chasing group inside 500m after being dropped with 3.6km remaining; positioning trumped climbing form.

rider_signals.HEALY Ben: positive: won KOM battles repeatedly and attacked solo 35km out showing willingness to execute ambitious moves despite previous effort
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: demonstrated patience bridging to Healy on descent rather than forcing, won first GT stage after calculated chase
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Bruno: negative: lost 30+ seconds on breakaway stage suggesting GC weakness despite UAE team strength elsewhere
rider_signals.RUBIO Einer: neutral: most dangerous GC rider in break at 11min down but couldn't contest KOM sprints against Healy
rider_signals.FRIGO Marco: positive: dropped twice but returned and nearly won sprint showing diesel recovery ability on undulating finales
